description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, possibly stucco or painted concrete, with a subtle base trim that mimics wood or stone. The front facade features a central double-door entrance flanked by two large windows, and a set of steps leading up to the entry. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, while the sides have a mix of single and paired windows, providing ample natural light. The structure sits on a neatly manicured green lawn, and there are several poster boards or signs positioned to one side, possibly for display or informational purposes. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible porch or decorative architectural embellishments.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light-colored walls, and symmetrical window arrangements, set on a green lawn with display boards to one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, two large front windows, and several display boards on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting a single window and a blank wall, with the display boards visible at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two small windows and a plain back wall, with no visible doors or decorations.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring two large windows and the display boards partially visible at the far right.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with paired and single side windows
